questions: You mentioned getting stressed when the MCP spec was finalizing around the same time you needed to build—what made you decide to learn the RC spec as it landed rather than wait for stable, and did that bet pay off?
Walk me through why you put risk classification on MCP but kept the procedural know-how of 'how to conduct a claim review' as a Skill instead—what would go wrong if you flipped those?
You deliberately seeded two unsubstantiated claims to give next week's adversary something to attack—why leave yourself vulnerable in Part 1 instead of making all twelve claims defensible?
